productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Colorful Chest Tape Polo Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionLight blue polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with blue buttoned placket, black and red bands across the upper chest with embroidered logo, beige horizontal bands from upper chest to hemline and vented sidesFittingComfortWash care Hand wash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Get into the travel mode with this comfortable polo neck tee from wrangler. The blue and beige horizontal stripes on the tee is inspired by the endless horizons that a cowboy encounters. Team this tee with jeans and rugged shoes for casual outings with friends, while the cotton fabric keeps you dry and comfortable through all seasons. Add on a pair of stylish footwear from the wide international range available at myntra and stay cool and comfortable through all seasons in this pure cotton tee.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
